title: Creating a Basic SQL Query
scenario: A user wants to create a SQL query that retrieves the names of all employees with a salary above $50,000. The target output should be a formatted SQL query string that meets the requirements. The output should not contain any unnecessary characters.
constraints: Must retrieve the names of all employees with a salary above $50,000
Must not contain any unnecessary characters

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the SQL syntax is valid
Check if the output adheres to the constraints (retrieving the correct data)
Check if the output is well-formatted and easy to read
